package.name: g1_local_map
package.description: Local rolling 3D voxel map for G1 navigation. Consumes the DLIO deskewed, registered point cloud (/dlio/odom_node/pointcloud/deskewed, odom frame, ~10 Hz) plus the DLIO odometry, removes the ground via per-cell lowest-point segmentation, and maintains a robot-centred rolling voxel occupancy grid with temporal decay. Publishes the obstacle cloud + sparse voxel grid (PointCloud2) and a 2D projected costmap (OccupancyGrid) to feed the a_star_mpc local planner. Replaces the keyframe-driven /dlio/map_node/map (which only updates on ~1 m / 45 deg motion) for fast local obstacle sensing.
